content:
# Personal Checking Referral Programs

Northstar Bank personal checking referrals apply only to the listed account programs. Use the account the referred customer opens to determine both bonus amounts, the minimum referred deposit, and the annual referral cap.

## Program Amounts
| Account | Referrer bonus | Referred bonus | Minimum referred deposit | Referrer tenure | Annual cap |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Blue Account | $35 | $30 | $500 | 0 days | 5 |
| Green Fee-Free Account | $20 | $35 | $300 | 0 days | 10 |
| Light Green Account | $15 | $25 | $100 | 0 days | 3 |
| Purple Account | $50 | $30 | $1000 | 0 days | 6 |

## Eligibility Checks
1. Match the referral to the exact account opened: Blue Account, Green Fee-Free Account, Light Green Account, or Purple Account.
2. Confirm the referred customer meets the listed minimum referred deposit for that account.
3. Confirm the referrer has not exceeded the account's annual cap before quoting the referrer bonus.
4. Apply the referrer tenure value shown for the account; each listed personal checking program has a tenure requirement of 0 days.

## Customer Explanation
When explaining the program, quote the referrer bonus and referred bonus separately because the amounts are not always the same. If the customer asks about account terms beyond referral rewards, see "Blue Account Terms", "Green Fee Free Account Terms", or "Light Green Account Terms" as applicable. For rules shared across referral categories, see "Referral Limits And Eligibility".
title: Personal Checking Referral Programs
